buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium uppercase tracking-wide text-xs
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium uppercase tracking-wide text-xs
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium uppercase tracking-wide text-xs
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise texture on sidebar background to give 'matte' finish
visual_enhancers.shadows: Very minimal, mainly for dropdowns and modals

invoices.layout: Split View (List of Invoices | Invoice Preview)

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/manrope', '@fontsource/barlow-condensed', '@fontsource/jetbrains-mono' to package.json and import in index.js
THEME SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors defined in this JSON. Use CSS variables in index.css for theme switching capability.
SIDEBAR: Create a persistent 'AppSidebar' component. Use a dark theme for the sidebar (#0F172A) to contrast with the light content area.
INVOICE PRINTING: Create a dedicated route '/invoice/print/:id' that renders the invoice in a clean, print-friendly format. Use `@media print` CSS to hide sidebar/buttons and ensure 100% width.
DATA FETCHING: Use `tanstack-query` (react-query) for all API calls. Mock the API calls for now if backend is not ready, but structure them properly.
FORMS: Use `react-hook-form` and `zod` for validation. This is CRITICAL for the inventory add/edit forms.
DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, rows) for testing.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Keep it flat and clean.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Manrope' for body and 'Barlow Condensed' for headings.
Ensure high contrast for all text. No light gray text on white backgrounds.
Use 'Lucide React' for icons. Keep them simple and consistent.
The 'Timeless' brand implies durability. UI should feel stable, not floating or bouncy.
